mapper.select: SELECT id, content_type AS contentType, auto_mode AS autoMode, enable_sensitive_check AS enableSensitiveCheck, enable_image_check AS enableImageCheck, risk_threshold AS riskThreshold, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM audit_strategies ORDER BY id

SELECT id, content_type AS contentType, auto_mode AS autoMode, enable_sensitive_check AS enableSensitiveCheck, enable_image_check AS enableImageCheck, risk_threshold AS riskThreshold, status FROM audit_strategies WHERE content_type = #{contentType} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_strategies (content_type, auto_mode, enable_sensitive_check, enable_image_check, risk_threshold, status, created_at) VALUES (#{contentType}, #{autoMode}, #{enableSensitiveCheck}, #{enableImageCheck}, #{riskThreshold}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE audit_strategies SET auto_mode = #{autoMode}, enable_sensitive_check = #{enableSensitiveCheck}, enable_image_check = #{enableImageCheck}, risk_threshold = #{riskThreshold}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
